description: An elevated photographic view captures a large industrial facility, identifiable as a nuclear power plant, situated between green agricultural fields and a coastal area. In the midground, the sprawling industrial complex features numerous buildings of varying sizes and colours (grey, beige, red, blue). Prominently visible are four large, hyperboloid cooling towers (two on the left, two on the right), one of which emits a plume of white steam or vapour. Several tall, slender chimneys or stacks also rise from the complex, with one also showing an emission. The foreground consists of vibrant green agricultural fields, subdivided by distinct hedgerows or low field boundaries, indicating a traditional rural land use pattern. In the background, beyond the industrial site, a coastline with a wide intertidal zone or mudflats meets a body of water (likely the sea). A small town or settlement is visible along the coastline. Further in the distance, a range of hills or mountains stretches across the horizon under a clear sky.
